content.text:
Perfect! Let me compile the comprehensive summary of all components and utilities.

---

## Comprehensive UI Components & Utilities Summary

### Core UI Components (web/components/ui/)

#### 1. **Badge**
- **File:** `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/web/components/ui/badge.tsx`
- **Component:** `Badge`
- **Props Interface:** 
  - Extends `React.ComponentProps<"span">`
  - `variant?: "default" | "secondary" | "destructive" | "outline" | "ghost" | "link"`
  - `asChild?: boolean` (Slot composition)
  - `className?: string`
- **Description:** Compact inline badge component with 6 color variants. Supports icon rendering with 3px focus ring.
- **Variants:** default, secondary, destructive, outline, ghost, link

#### 2. **Button**
- **File:** `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/web/components/ui/button.tsx`
- **Component:** `Button`
- **Props Interface:**
  - Extends `React.ComponentProps<"button">`
  - `variant?: "default" | "destructive" | "outline" | "secondary" | "ghost" | "link"`
  - `size?: "default" | "xs" | "sm" | "lg" | "icon" | "icon-xs" | "icon-sm" | "icon-lg"`
  - `asChild?: boolean`
  - `className?: string`
- **Description:** Primary action button with multiple size/variant combos. Disabled state support with reduced opacity.
- **Variants:** 6 variants × 7 sizes = extensive customization

#### 3. **Card**
- **File:** `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/web/components/ui/card.tsx`
- **Exports:** `Card`, `CardHeader`, `CardTitle`, `CardDescription`, `CardAction`, `CardContent`, `CardFooter`
- **Props:** All accept `React.ComponentProps<"div">` + `className`
- **Description:** Composable card structure with automatic grid layout for header/action alignment. Uses `@container/card-header` for responsive design.
- **Sub-components:** 7 exported parts for flexible card composition

#### 4. **Input**
- **File:** `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/web/components/ui/input.tsx`
- **Component:** `Input`
- **Props:** Standard `React.ComponentProps<"input">`
- **Description:** Text input with Tailwind styling, focus ring, error states (aria-invalid), and file upload support.

#### 5. **Checkbox**
- **File:** `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/web/components/ui/checkbox.tsx`
- **Component:** `Checkbox`
- **Props:** `React.ComponentProps<typeof CheckboxPrimitive.Root>`
- **Description:** Radix UI checkbox with check icon, focus ring, and disabled state styling.

#### 6. **Table**
- **File:** `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/web/components/ui/table.tsx`
- **Exports:** `Table`, `TableHeader`, `TableBody`, `TableFooter`, `TableHead`, `TableRow`, `TableCell`, `TableCaption`
- **Props:** All accept `React.ComponentProps<"*">` + `className`
- **Description:** Semantic table composition with horizontal scroll for small screens. Hover states on rows, proper spacing for checkboxes.

#### 7. **StatusDot**
- **File:** `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/web/components/ui/status-dot.tsx`
- **Component:** `StatusDot`
- **Props:**
  - `status: string` (case-insensitive)
  - `className?: string`
- **Description:** 2×2px colored dot for status badges. Maps: `completed` → green, `running` → blue, `pending` → orange, `failed` → red. Fallback gray for unknown statuses.

#### 8. **ProviderBadge**
- **File:** `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/web/components/ui/provider-badge.tsx`
- **Component:** `ProviderBadge` & helper `getProviderIcon(provider: string)`
- **Props:**
  - `provider: string` (github, dockerhub, ecr-public, gitlab, pypi, npm)
  - `className?: string`
- **Description:** Provider-branded badge with icon + label. Maps 6 registry providers to branded colors and Font Awesome icons. Fallback gray for unknown providers.

#### 9. **VersionChip**
- **File:** `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/web/components/ui/version-chip.tsx`
- **Component:** `VersionChip`
- **Props:**

input.content:
# Shared UI Components Reference Reference for all unified UI components in `web/components/`. Use these instead of creating inline alternatives. ## Core Components (`web/components/ui/`) ### UrgencyPill Unified urgency indicator. **Do not** create local urgency colors or chips — always use this. ```tsx import { UrgencyPill } from "@/components/ui/urgency-pill"; // Three variants: // 18×18 circle icon (compact spaces) // icon + text pill (tables, detail views) // text-only pill (feeds, lists) ``` | Props | Type | Default | Description | |-------|------|---------|-------------| | `urgency` | `string` | — | `critical`, `high`, `medium`, `low` (case-insensitive) | | `variant` | `"icon-only" \| "labeled" \| "text"` | `"labeled"` | Display format | | `className` | `string?` | — | Additional classes | Levels: critical (red), high (orange), medium (amber), low (green). ### UrgencyCallout Alert-style block for HIGH/CRITICAL urgency on detail pages. Renders nothing for medium/low. ```tsx import { UrgencyCallout } from "@/components/ui/urgency-callout"; ``` | Props | Type | Default | Description | |-------|------|---------|-------------| | `urgency` | `string` | — | Only renders for `high` or `critical` | | `description` | `string?` | — | Optional detail text | | `className` | `string?` | — | Additional classes | ### Switch Radix UI toggle for on/off states (enable/disable polling, feature toggles). ```tsx import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch"; ``` | Props | Type | Default | Description | |-------|------|---------|-------------| | `checked` | `boolean` | — | Current state | | `onCheckedChange` | `(checked: boolean) => void` | — | Toggle handler | | `size` | `"sm" \| "default"` | `"default"` | Switch size | ### Checkbox Radix UI checkbox for multi-select and boolean fields. ```tsx import { Checkbox } from "@/components/ui/checkbox"; setValue(!!checked)} /> ``` Standard Radix `CheckboxPrimitive.Root` props. ### VersionChip Monospaced version label in a compact pill. ```tsx import { VersionChip } from "@/components/ui/version-chip"; ``` | Props | Type | Default | Description | |-------|------|---------|-------------| | `version` | `string` | — | Version string to display | | `className` | `string?` | — | Additional classes | ### ProviderBadge Registry provider badge with icon and label. ```tsx import { ProviderBadge, getProviderIcon } from "@/components/ui/provider-badge"; // Icon only (e.g. in feed rows): const Icon = getProviderIcon("dockerhub"); // Returns a render function: (props: { size, className }) => JSX ``` Supported providers: `github`, `dockerhub`, `ecr-public`, `gitlab`, `pypi`, `npm`. ### StatusDot 2×2px colored dot for status indicators. ```tsx import { StatusDot } from "@/components/ui/status-dot"; ``` Status colors: `completed` (green), `running` (blue), `pending` (orange), `failed` (red). Unknown statuses render gray. ### ProjectLogo Avatar that prefers GitHub/GitLab avatar, falls back to a colored initial. ```tsx import { ProjectLogo } from "@/components/ui/project-logo"; ``` | Props | Type | Default | Description | |-------|------|---------|-------------| | `name` | `string` | — | Project name (used for initial + color hash) | | `sources` | `Source[]?` | — | Project sources (for GitHub/GitLab avatar lookup) | | `size` | `number` | `40` | Pixel size | ### SectionLabel Uppercase muted section heading. ```tsx import { SectionLabel } from "@/components/ui/section-label"; Trigger Rules ``` ### ConfirmDialog Modal confirmation with async action support. ```tsx import { ConfirmDialog } from "@/components/ui/confirm-dialog"; { await deleteRelease(id); }} confirmLabel="Delete" // optional, defaults to i18n label /> ``` ### Button Primary action button with CVA variants. ```tsx import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; ``` Variants: `default`, `destructive`, `outline`, `secondary`, `ghost`, `link`. Sizes: `default`, `xs`, `sm`, `lg`, `icon`, `icon-xs`, `icon-sm`, `icon-lg`. ### Badge Inline badge/tag component. ```tsx import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"; Beta ``` Variants: `default`, `secondary`, `destructive`, `outline`, `ghost`, `link`. ### Card Composable card layout. ```tsx import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter, CardAction } from "@/components/ui/card"; Title Subtitle ... ``` ### Input Styled text input with error state support. ```tsx import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"; ``` ### Table Composable semantic table. ```tsx import { Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell } from "@/components/ui/table"; Name Value
``` ## Filter Components (`web/components/filters/`) ### FilterBar Chip-based filter UI with popover menus. Supports select, boolean, and date-range filter types. ```tsx import { FilterBar } from "@/components/filters/filter-bar"; import type { FilterConfig } from "@/components/filters/filter-bar"; const filters: FilterConfig[] = [ { key: "provider", label: "Provider", type: "select", options: [ { value: "github", label: "GitHub" }, { value: "dockerhub", label: "Docker Hub" }, ]}, { key: "excluded", label: "Excluded", type: "boolean", defaultValue: "false" }, { key: "date", label: "Date", type: "date-range" }, ]; ``` Date presets: 7d, 30d, 90d, 1y. Use `expandDatePreset()` to convert to ISO date strings for API calls. ### useFilterParams Hook that syncs filter + pagination state with URL query parameters. Prevents cross-page param leakage. ```tsx import { useFilterParams } from "@/components/filters/use-filter-params"; const { filters, setFilters, page, setPage } = useFilterParams( ["provider", "excluded", "date_from", "date_to"], // allowed URL keys { excluded: "false" } // defaults ); ``` Only keys in `allowedKeys` are read from or written to the URL. Stale params from other pages are ignored. ## Utility Functions (`web/lib/`) ### timeAgo (`web/lib/format.ts`) ```tsx import { timeAgo } from "@/lib/format"; timeAgo("2026-03-29T10:00:00Z") // "2h ago" timeAgo(null) // "—" ``` ### formatInterval (`web/lib/format.ts`) ```tsx import { formatInterval } from "@/lib/format"; formatInterval(3600) // "Hourly" formatInterval(86400) // "Daily" ``` ### useTranslation (`web/lib/i18n/context`) ```tsx import { useTranslation } from "@/lib/i18n/context"; const { t } = useTranslation(); {t("sr.title")} ``` Messages in `web/lib/i18n/messages/en.json` and `zh.json`. ## Design System Constants ### Urgency Levels | Level | Color | Icon | |-------|-------|------| | critical | Red (`#dc2626`) | `AlertOctagon` | | high | Orange (`#ea580c`) | `AlertTriangle` | | medium | Amber (`#d97706`) | `Circle` | | low | Green (`#16a34a`) | `CheckCircle` | ### Status Colors | Status | Color | |--------|-------| | completed | Green (`#16a34a`) | | running | Blue (`#2563eb`) | | pending | Orange (`#d97706`) | | failed | Red (`#dc2626`) | ### Fonts - **Headings:** `var(--font-raleway)` — Raleway - **Body text:** `var(--font-dm-sans)` — DM Sans - **Code/versions:** `'JetBrains Mono', monospace` ### Icons Use **Lucide React** (`lucide-react`) for all icons. Provider-specific icons use **react-icons/fa** (Font Awesome). ### CSS Variables Theme colors are defined as CSS variables: `--foreground`, `--background`, `--surface`, `--border`, `--text-secondary`, `--text-muted`, `--beacon-accent` (`#e8601a`), `--status-completed`.

# Shared UI Components Reference Reference for all unified UI components in `web/components/`. Use these instead of creating inline alternatives. ## Core Components (`web/components/ui/`) ### UrgencyPill Unified urgency indicator. **Do not** create local urgency colors or chips — always use this. ```tsx import { UrgencyPill } from "@/components/ui/urgency-pill"; // Three variants: // 18×18 circle icon (compact spaces) // icon + text pill (tables, detail views) // text-only pill (feeds, lists) ``` | Props | Type | Default | Description | |-------|------|---------|-------------| | `urgency` | `string` | — | `critical`, `high`, `medium`, `low` (case-insensitive) | | `variant` | `"icon-only" \| "labeled" \| "text"` | `"labeled"` | Display format | | `className` | `string?` | — | Additional classes | Levels: critical (red), high (orange), medium (amber), low (green). ### UrgencyCallout Alert-style block for HIGH/CRITICAL urgency on detail pages. Renders nothing for medium/low. ```tsx import { UrgencyCallout } from "@/components/ui/urgency-callout"; ``` | Props | Type | Default | Description | |-------|------|---------|-------------| | `urgency` | `string` | — | Only renders for `high` or `critical` | | `description` | `string?` | — | Optional detail text | | `className` | `string?` | — | Additional classes | ### Switch Radix UI toggle for on/off states (enable/disable polling, feature toggles). ```tsx import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch"; ``` | Props | Type | Default | Description | |-------|------|---------|-------------| | `checked` | `boolean` | — | Current state | | `onCheckedChange` | `(checked: boolean) => void` | — | Toggle handler | | `size` | `"sm" \| "default"` | `"default"` | Switch size | ### Checkbox Radix UI checkbox for multi-select and boolean fields. ```tsx import { Checkbox } from "@/components/ui/checkbox"; setValue(!!checked)} /> ``` Standard Radix `CheckboxPrimitive.Root` props. ### VersionChip Monospaced version label in a compact pill. ```tsx import { VersionChip } from "@/components/ui/version-chip"; ``` | Props | Type | Default | Description | |-------|------|---------|-------------| | `version` | `string` | — | Version string to display | | `className` | `string?` | — | Additional classes | ### ProviderBadge Registry provider badge with icon and label. ```tsx import { ProviderBadge, getProviderIcon } from "@/components/ui/provider-badge"; // Icon only (e.g. in feed rows): const Icon = getProviderIcon("dockerhub"); // Returns a render function: (props: { size, className }) => JSX ``` Supported providers: `github`, `dockerhub`, `ecr-public`, `gitlab`, `pypi`, `npm`. ### StatusDot 2×2px colored dot for status indicators. ```tsx import { StatusDot } from "@/components/ui/status-dot"; ``` Status colors: `completed` (green), `running` (blue), `pending` (orange), `failed` (red). Unknown statuses render gray. ### ProjectLogo Avatar that prefers GitHub/GitLab avatar, falls back to a colored initial. ```tsx import { ProjectLogo } from "@/components/ui/project-logo"; ``` | Props | Type | Default | Description | |-------|------|---------|-------------| | `name` | `string` | — | Project name (used for initial + color hash) | | `sources` | `Source[]?` | — | Project sources (for GitHub/GitLab avatar lookup) | | `size` | `number` | `40` | Pixel size | ### SectionLabel Uppercase muted section heading. ```tsx import { SectionLabel } from "@/components/ui/section-label"; Trigger Rules ``` ### ConfirmDialog Modal confirmation with async action support. ```tsx import { ConfirmDialog } from "@/components/ui/confirm-dialog"; { await deleteRelease(id); }} confirmLabel="Delete" // optional, defaults to i18n label /> ``` ### Button Primary action button with CVA variants. ```tsx import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; ``` Variants: `default`, `destructive`, `outline`, `secondary`, `ghost`, `link`. Sizes: `default`, `xs`, `sm`, `lg`, `icon`, `icon-xs`, `icon-sm`, `icon-lg`. ### Badge Inline badge/tag component. ```tsx import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"; Beta ``` Variants: `default`, `secondary`, `destructive`, `outline`, `ghost`, `link`. ### Card Composable card layout. ```tsx import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter, CardAction } from "@/components/ui/card"; Title Subtitle ... ``` ### Input Styled text input with error state support. ```tsx import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"; ``` ### Table Composable semantic table. ```tsx import { Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell } from "@/components/ui/table"; Name Value
``` ## Filter Components (`web/components/filters/`) ### FilterBar Chip-based filter UI with popover menus. Supports select, boolean, and date-range filter types. ```tsx import { FilterBar } from "@/components/filters/filter-bar"; import type { FilterConfig } from "@/components/filters/filter-bar"; const filters: FilterConfig[] = [ { key: "provider", label: "Provider", type: "select", options: [ { value: "github", label: "GitHub" }, { value: "dockerhub", label: "Docker Hub" }, ]}, { key: "excluded", label: "Excluded", type: "boolean", defaultValue: "false" }, { key: "date", label: "Date", type: "date-range" }, ]; ``` Date presets: 7d, 30d, 90d, 1y. Use `expandDatePreset()` to convert to ISO date strings for API calls. ### useFilterParams Hook that syncs filter + pagination state with URL query parameters. Prevents cross-page param leakage. ```tsx import { useFilterParams } from "@/components/filters/use-filter-params"; const { filters, setFilters, page, setPage } = useFilterParams( ["provider", "excluded", "date_from", "date_to"], // allowed URL keys { excluded: "false" } // defaults ); ``` Only keys in `allowedKeys` are read from or written to the URL. Stale params from other pages are ignored. ## Utility Functions (`web/lib/`) ### timeAgo (`web/lib/format.ts`) ```tsx import { timeAgo } from "@/lib/format"; timeAgo("2026-03-29T10:00:00Z") // "2h ago" timeAgo(null) // "—" ``` ### formatInterval (`web/lib/format.ts`) ```tsx import { formatInterval } from "@/lib/format"; formatInterval(3600) // "Hourly" formatInterval(86400) // "Daily" ``` ### useTranslation (`web/lib/i18n/context`) ```tsx import { useTranslation } from "@/lib/i18n/context"; const { t } = useTranslation(); {t("sr.title")} ``` Messages in `web/lib/i18n/messages/en.json` and `zh.json`. ## Design System Constants ### Urgency Levels | Level | Color | Icon | |-------|-------|------| | critical | Red (`#dc2626`) | `AlertOctagon` | | high | Orange (`#ea580c`) | `AlertTriangle` | | medium | Amber (`#d97706`) | `Circle` | | low | Green (`#16a34a`) | `CheckCircle` | ### Status Colors | Status | Color | |--------|-------| | completed | Green (`#16a34a`) | | running | Blue (`#2563eb`) | | pending | Orange (`#d97706`) | | failed | Red (`#dc2626`) | ### Fonts - **Headings:** `var(--font-raleway)` — Raleway - **Body text:** `var(--font-dm-sans)` — DM Sans - **Code/versions:** `'JetBrains Mono', monospace` ### Icons Use **Lucide React** (`lucide-react`) for all icons. Provider-specific icons use **react-icons/fa** (Font Awesome). ### CSS Variables Theme colors are defined as CSS variables: `--foreground`, `--background`, `--surface`, `--border`, `--text-secondary`, `--text-muted`, `--beacon-accent` (`#e8601a`), `--status-completed`.

content.text:
The document has been created at `docs/ui-components.md`. It covers:

- **Core UI components** — UrgencyPill (3 variants), Switch, Checkbox, VersionChip, ProviderBadge, StatusDot, ProjectLogo, SectionLabel, ConfirmDialog, Button, Badge, Card, Input, Table
- **Filter components** — FilterBar (with select/boolean/date-range types) and useFilterParams hook
- **Utility functions** — timeAgo, formatInterval, useTranslation
- **Design system constants** — urgency levels/colors, status colors, fonts, icon library, CSS variables

Each component includes import path, usage example, and props table so you (or any agent) can quickly reference and reuse them during future UX work.

refactor(web): unify toggle controls, urgency display, and fix filter bugs

- Replace native checkboxes and hand-rolled toggles with Radix UI
  Switch and Checkbox components across project-detail, project-form,
  and scan-results-table
- Consolidate 6+ urgency rendering patterns into a single UrgencyPill
  component with icon-only, labeled, and text variants
- Fix todo page urgency always null by adding urgency column to
  ListTodos/GetTodo SELECT and Scan in pgstore.go
- Fix cross-page filter param leakage in useFilterParams by detecting
  stale URL params and resetting page to 1
- Add vertical divider before "New Project" button on projects page
- Add shared UI components reference doc (docs/ui-components.md)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
